# `Call`

**Systems:** X16,C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, PET,  NES, OK64, ATARI2600, APPLEII, SNES, ORIC, BBCM, ACORN, ATARI800, MSX, SPECTRUM, GAMEBOY, AMSTRADCPC, VZ200, Z80, Z180  
**Parameters:** `a`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>Call( [address] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[address] - the address to call</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Performs a jsr to the specified address.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
Call(^$8000)
</code>

<p>Essentially creates the following:</p>

<code>
Asm("jsr $8000");
</code>


</div>
